parents.subject: LU-12949 obdclass: don't extend timer if obd stops

commit.subject: LU-12546 mdt: abort recovery between MDTs
commit.message:
LU-12546 mdt: abort recovery between MDTs

Add an option to abort recovery between MDTs in case there is a
problem during recovery (e.g. MDT is missing or has broken logs),
but don't abort recovery between MDT and clients.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/36027
Lustre-commit: dd9e79b64d49f6d66d121f072e0e7516963b4da0
